_comment: Godot version -> compatible addon versions. Agent MUST download the version listed here.
_format: Each addon entry has: repo (GitHub), tag (git tag to download), install_path (where to copy in project), autoload (project.godot autoload entry if needed), plugin (whether to enable in [editor_plugins])
_update_guide: When a new Godot or addon version is released, add/update the mapping below and test compatibility.

gecs.notes: ECS framework. Enable in Project Settings -> Plugins.

gdunit4.notes: v5.x series for Godot 4.3/4.4. v6.x requires Godot 4.5+.

godot_e2e.notes: E2E testing. Enable in Project Settings -> Plugins. Plugin auto-registers AutomationServer autoload.

gecs.notes: ECS framework. Enable in Project Settings -> Plugins.

gdunit4.notes: v5.x series for Godot 4.3/4.4. v6.x requires Godot 4.5+.

godot_e2e.notes: E2E testing. Enable in Project Settings -> Plugins. Plugin auto-registers AutomationServer autoload.

godot_e2e.notes: E2E testing. v1.2.0 requires Godot 4.5+; 4.3/4.4 stay on v1.1.0. Enable in Project Settings -> Plugins. Plugin auto-registers AutomationServer autoload.
